creator: marquis@roble.com
text:
> State-Changed-By: remko
> Something else seems wrong at your end, I am not running the module
> anywhere but I run several Apache servers. Yes Apache complains but it
> does not prevent it from starting.

The only change from a GENERIC DVD-install was to build/install kernel and
world (to RELENG_7).  Since the solution was posted in response to a
similar bug report it is not a one-off error, and so should qualify for
some QA.  It is reproducible on the target server.  Can you see anything in
this kernel that might cause the bug?

Roger Marquis
